name: test_project_graph_retrieval_eval
description: Auto-built benchmark from the real test project. Includes practical project questions and high-quality card-linked graph relationships.

cases.question: Where does the project say who pays for construction power and the new power connection?
expected_answer_points: new power connection paid by employer

cases.question: Who is identified as the Employer for the 910 MLD WTP Panjrapur tender?
